# Code Block With Language

```typescript
interface User {
  id: number
  name: string
  email: string
}

function greet(user: User): string {
  return `Hello, ${user.name}!`
}
```

```python
def fibonacci(n: int) -> int:
    if n <= 1:
        return n
    return fibonacci(n - 1) + fibonacci(n - 2)
```
